description.value:
+3 AC, 10 lbs, 30 gp

Kite shields are as wide as the wielder's torso but extend downward with a point or oval extension to protect the legs, which can also be used offensively to knock an enemy off guard. While wielding a Kite, you only add a maximum of +2 to your AC from your Dexterity modifier.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
BasicYou gain advantage on any saving throw or ability check made to resist being knocked prone or moved along the ground.
MasterWhen you win an Athletics contest against an enemy within 5ft, you can Stagger your enemy in addition to winning the contest.
